languages.text: Похоже, долгое пребывание незваного гостя во временной петле повредило отточенный механизм ловушки — в реплике на мостовой наметилась брешь.

traits.locale_text: Похоже, долгое пребывание незваного гостя во временной петле повредило отточенный механизм ловушки — в реплике на мостовой наметилась брешь.

languages.text: It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica masonry.
languages.original_text: Похоже, долгое пребывание незваного гостя во временной петле повредило отточенный механизм ловушки — в реплике на мостовой наметилась брешь.

traits.locale_text: It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica's masonry.
It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica's masonry.
It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica masonry.
It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica masonry.

languages.text: Offenbar hat die anhaltende Gegenwart eines ungebetenen Gastes innerhalb der Zeitschleife den einst so präzisen Mechanismus der Falle beschädigt. In den Mauern der Replik ist ein Riss entstanden.
languages.original_text: It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica masonry.

traits.locale_text: Offenbar hat die anhaltende Gegenwart eines ungebetenen Gastes innerhalb der Zeitschleife den einst so präzisen Mechanismus der Falle beschädigt. In den Mauern der Replik ist ein Riss entstanden.

languages.text: Il semble que la présence prolongée d'un individu imprévu dans la boucle temporelle ait endommagé le mécanisme jusqu'alors fiable du piège. Une brèche s'est formée dans les murs de la réplique.
languages.original_text: It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica masonry.

traits.locale_text: Il semble que la présence prolongée d'un individu imprévu dans la boucle temporelle ait endommagé le mécanisme jusqu'alors fiable du piège. Une brèche s'est formée dans les murs de la réplique.

languages.text: 仿制的石墙上出现了一道裂口。看来，不速之客在时间循环中停留得太久，已经损坏了这个陷阱原本精密的运作机制。
languages.original_text: It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica masonry.

traits.locale_text: 仿制的石墙上出现了一道裂口。看来，不速之客在时间循环中停留得太久，已经损坏了这个陷阱原本精密的运作机制。

languages.text: Parece que la prolongada presencia de un invitado no deseado en el bucle temporal ha dañado el antaño preciso mecanismo de la trampa. Se ha abierto una brecha en la superficie de la réplica.
languages.original_text: It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica masonry.

traits.locale_text: Parece que la prolongada presencia de un invitado no deseado en el bucle temporal ha dañado el antaño preciso mecanismo de la trampa. Se ha abierto una brecha en la superficie de la réplica.

languages.text: どうやら、招かれざる客がタイムループに長く滞在したせいで、トラップの精巧なメカニズムが壊れてしまったようだ。
languages.original_text: It seems that the uninvited guest's long stay in the time loop had damaged the fine-tuned mechanism of the trap — there was a gap in the replica of the pavement.

languages.text: Görünüşe göre zaman döngüsünün içindeki davetsiz misafirin uzun süreli varlığı, tuzağın bir zamanlar kusursuz işleyen mekanizmasına zarar vermiş. Kopyalanmış duvarda bir gedik açılmış.
languages.original_text: It seems the prolonged presence of an uninvited guest within the temporal loop has damaged the trap's once-precise mechanism. A breach has appeared in the replica masonry.

traits.locale_text: Görünüşe göre zaman döngüsünün içindeki davetsiz misafirin uzun süreli varlığı, tuzağın bir zamanlar kusursuz işleyen mekanizmasına zarar vermiş. Kopyalanmış duvarda bir gedik açılmış.
